title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 32.040 - Headquarters in Jefferson City — branch offices
text:
32.040.  Headquarters in Jefferson City — branch offices. — The board of public buildings shall provide the director of revenue and the department of revenue with suitable quarters in the City of Jefferson.  The director of revenue shall establish and maintain permanent branch offices in the cities of St. Louis and Kansas City, and may select additional places in the state for special full-time or temporary offices.
(L. 1945 p. 1428 § 7, A.L. 1959 H.B. 115)
